LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF VANCE COOPER'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-14-536983, CGC-13-532874 WITH CASE CGC-13-535395 IS GRANTED. (CCP SEC. 1048.) THE THREE CASES INVOLVE COMMON QUESTIONS OF LAW AND FACT. CGC-13-535395 (COOPER V. 330 RITCH ET AL.), CGC-13-532874 (TAYLOR V. 330 RITCH ET AL.), AND CGC-14-536983 (CALLOWAY V. 330 RITCH ET AL.) ARE CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES. CGC-14-536983 (CALLOWAY V. 330 RITCH ET AL.) IS THE LEAD CASE. THE CONSOLIDATED CASES ARE ASSIGNED TO JUDGE STEWART PER THE ASSIGNED CASE MANAGEMENT ORDER ISSUED ON SEPTEMBER 25, 2014 IN CGC-14-536983 (CALLOWAY V. 330 RITCH ET AL.). THERE IS A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON OCTOBER 17, 2014 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 613. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR# 5976 (302/EHG)

THE CASE HAS BEEN ASSIGNED TO JUDGE STEWART IN DEPARTMENT 613 PER THE ASSIGNED CASE MANAGEMENT ORDER ISSUED ON SEPTEMBER 25, 2014. JUDGE PRO TEM ROBERT KANE, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED. (D302)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses From Pltf To Special Interrogatories, Set One, Nos 3, 4 And 5 And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-29-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT DAVES J SCOTCH, LLC DOING BUSINESS AS 330 RITCH's Motion To Compel Further Responses From Plaintiff To Special Interrogatories, Set One, Nos 3, 4 And 5 And Request For Sanctions is Off calendar as to Dept. 302. The case has been assigned to Judge Stewart in Department 613 per the assigned case management order issued on September 25, 2014. Judge Pro Tem Robert Kane, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-14-536983, CGC-13-532874 WITH CASE CGC-13-535395
Off Calendar Oct-03-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Mary Alexander, Esq. of Mary Alexander and Associates, Tel. 415.433.4440, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other apperance.

RULING: The court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF VANCE COOPER's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-14-536983, CGC-13-532874 WITH CASE CGC-13-535395 is Granted. (CCP sec. 1048.) The three cases involve common questions of law and fact. CGC-13-535395 (Cooper v. 330 Ritch et al.), CGC-13-532874 (Taylor v. 330 Ritch et al.), and CGC-14-536983 (Calloway v. 330 Ritch et al.) are consolidated for all purposes. CGC-14-536983 (Calloway v. 330 Ritch et al.) is the lead case. The consolidated cases are assigned to Judge Stewart per the Assigned Case Management Order issued on September 25, 2014 in CGC-14-536983 (Calloway v. 330 Ritch et al.). There is a case management conference on October 17, 2014 at 9:00 am in Dept. 613. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR# 5976
